text: Two giraffes, one sitting and one with head bowed, make a graceful pair as they lounge in their enclosure.
People in lie to get hot dogs or lemonade .
A kitchen with white cabinets and a black stove.
A boat traveling down the water in the middle of a body of water, with a man on  a bench watching.
A red stop sign on top of a wooden stick under a cloudy sky.
A vase filled with yellow and purple flowers.
Two men performing acrobatics upside down on snow skis.
A bus with fresh paint and newspapers cover all the windows.
A person sitting with doughnut balls, a sandwich and a soup bowl.
An airplane with smoke coming out is in the sky.
